SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-26-2021 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANTS TO JUN-01-2021 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF DOYLE DEVELOPMENT, INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY JOHN DOYLE VIA ZOOM APPEARANCE. DEFENDANT KATIE KENNEDY AND SINEAD KENNEDY ARE PRESENT VIA UNAUTHORIZED ZOOM APPEARANCES. CONTINUANCE FOR DEFENDANTS TO SUBMIT ZOOM APPEARANCE REQUESTS TIMELY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT: PENDING SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT.
THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. CASE SETTLED. NO APPEARANCES. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
REMARK: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM RECD IN MAIL 4/23/21 FROM DEFENDANT, SINEAD KENNEDY. **UNTIMELY** FORWARDED TO DEPT 506.
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT KENNEDY, KATIE
DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT KENNEDY, KATIE

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-01-2021 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO JUN-29-2021 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF DOYLE DEVELOPMENTS, INC IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY JOHN DOYLE. DEFENDANT KATIE KENNEDY IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SINEAD KENNEDY IS PRESENT. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IN COURT FOR A PAYMENT OF $3170 TO THE PLAINTIFF FOR WORK CONTRACTED AND PERFORMED AT 910 DIAMOND STREET, SF BY DOYLE DEVELOPMENTS. PLAINTIFF SHALL TERMINATE RELATED INVOICES PERTAINING TO THIS PROJECT. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE JUN-29-2021 HEARING IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE. IF NO APPEARANCES THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY PLAINTIFF DOYLE DEVELOPMENTS, INC.
ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR HEARING BY ZOOM **GRANTED**
